title: KZ-2 SSOT inventory
objective:
Run script:
"""
root = Path('governance')
queue_path = Path('governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if queue_path.exists() else {'tasks': []}
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('id') == 'KZ-2':
        task['status'] = 'IN_PROGRESS'
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T15:10:00Z'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
items = []
for p in root.rglob('*'):
    if p.is_file():
        name = p.name.lower()
        s = str(p).lower()
        if 'ssot' in name or 'ssot' in s or 'single_source' in s or 'source_of_truth' in s:
            items.append(str(p))
# Build duplicate groups by normalized stem.
groups = {}
for item in items:
    p = Path(item)
    key = p.stem.lower().replace('_copy','').replace('-copy','').replace('.bak','').replace('_backup','').replace('-backup','').replace('_duplicate','').replace('-duplicate','')
    groups.setdefault(key, []).append(item)
duplicates = {k:v for k,v in groups.items() if len(v) > 1}
state = Path('governance/state/KZ2_SSOT_DUPLICATES_INVENTORY.json')
state.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'KZ-2A','trace_id':'kz2_ssot_duplicates_inventory','status':'completed','release_pass':False,'ssot_candidate_count':len(items),'duplicate_group_count':len(duplicates),'duplicates':duplicates,'workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'KZ-2 eliminate SSOT duplicates'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/KZ2_SSOT_DUPLICATES_INVENTORY.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
report.write_text('# KZ-2A | SSOT duplicates inventory\nStatus: completed\nDate: 2026-06-04\n\nFound SSOT candidate files and duplicate groups. Workflow lock respected; no .github/workflows files touched.\n\nDuplicate groups:\n' + json.dumps(duplicates, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n\nNext: KZ-2 eliminate SSOT duplicates.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
"""No issue comments.
